svg.text: PLAYDEX — Diagrama ERD do Banco de Dados

g.text: • 6 tabelas de transações (orders, transactions, withdrawals, coupons, pd_points_transactions, subscriptions)
• 4 tabelas de conteúdo (products, categories, blog_posts, community_posts)
• 4 tabelas de usuários (users, accounts, affiliates, affiliate_referrals)
• 4 tabelas auxiliares (reviews, messages, notifications, verifications, favorites, interventions, product_images)
